sections.sectionTitle: Samaria a Pukna leh Israel mite a Kilakna

verses.text: Judah kumpi Ahaz' kum sawmlenihna kumin Elah' tapa Hoshea in Samaria panin Israel tungah uk ding kipan a, amah in kum kua sung uk hi
Topa' muhna-ah amah a sia gamta a, ahi zongin ama ma-a Israel kumpi dangte bang hilo hi
Assiria kumpi Shalmaneser amah a simin kuanto hi. Tua ciangin Hoshea ama khutnuai mi suak a, ama tungah siah a puak hi

Ahih hangin Assiria kumpipa in Hoshea a zuautatna mu hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in Egypt kumpipa So kiangah kamtaite sawlsim a, a kumkumin ahih ngeisa bangin Assiria kumpipa tungah siah pia nawnlo hi. Tua ahih ciangin Assiria kumpipa in amah man a, thong sungah koihin a hencip hi
Tua ciangin Assiria kumpipa in gamsung khempeuh simin Samaria ciangdong tung a, amah in kum thum sung umcih hi
Hoshea' kum kuana kumin Assiria kumpipa in Samaria la a, amah in Assiria-ah Israel mite ciahpihin Halah gamsung, Gozan gama om Habor gun gei, leh Media khuapite sungah amaute a koih hi
Hih thu a pian'na pen Egypt kumpi Faro' khutnuai Egypt gam panin amaute a paikhiatpih a Pasian uh Topa' tungah Israel mite khial a, pasian dangte kihta-in
Israel mite' mai-ah Topa in a hawlkhiat minamte' ngeina leh Israel kumpite in a pian'saktawm ngeinate a zuihna hang uh ahi hi
Tua ciangin Israel mite in Topa a Pasian uh langpangin a manlo na vaihawm uh hi. Amaute in amau-a' dingin galvilna bukno-a kipan kulh a nei khuapi dongin khuapi khempeuhah mualtunga biakna bawl uh hi
Amaute in amau-a' dingin mual sang tung khempeuh leh singniim nuai khempeuhah biakna songte leh Asherah milimte a phut uh hi
Tua ciangin amaute' mai-ah Topa in a puakkhiat minamte' hih bangin amaute in mualtunga biakna mun khempeuh tungah paknamtui a hal uh hi. Amaute in a hoihlo nate hihin Topa hehsak uh a
Topa in amaute tungah, “Note in na hih kei ding uh hi,” a cih milimte' na sem uh hi

Ahi zongin Topa in kamsangte khempeuh leh thumute khempeuh tung tawnin Israel leh Judah mite hilhkhol a, “Na pu na pate uh ka thupiak thukhamte khempeuh, leh kamsangte ahi ka nasemte' tung tawnin note kiangah thu kong puak bangin na gamtat siate panun kihei-in ka thupiaknate leh ka thukhamte zui un,” a ci hi
Ahih hangin amaute in a thu ngailo uh a, Topa a Pasian uh a umlo a pu a pate uh mah bangin lungsim khauh uh hi

Amaute in ama thukhamte, leh a pu a pate uh tawh a bawl a thuciamna, leh amaute tungah a piak hilhkholhnate simmawh uh hi. Amaute in a mawkna milimte zui-in a mawkna suak uh a, amaute tawh kibangin gamta kei un ci-in Topa in a thupiak tawh kisai-in, amaute in amau' kiima om minamte zui uh hi

Amaute in Topa a Pasian uh thupiakte khempeuh nusia-in amau-a' dingin a kisung bawngno lim nih bawl uh hi. Amaute in Asherah milim khat bawl uh a, vantunga om nate khempeuh bia-in Baal milim na sem uh hi
Amaute in biakna-in a tanute uh leh a tapate uh halin vankahna leh aisanna zang uh a, Topa' muhna-ah a sia a gamta dingin kipia tawmin amah hehsak uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin Israel mite tungah Topa heh a, ama muhna panin amaute hemkhia hi. Kuamah dang om nawnloin Judah gammi bek omlai hi
Judah mite in zong Topa a Pasian uh thupiaknate zuiloin Israel mite in a phuahtawm ngeinate zuihpih uh hi
Tua ciangin Topa in Israel suanlekhakte khempeuh nialin amaute gimsak a, ama muhna panin amaute a paihkhiat dongin amaute a siasak migilote' khutsungah amaute a pia hi

Amah in David suante tung panin Israel gam a balkhiat khit ciangin Israel mite in Nebat' tapa Jeroboam kumpi-in koih uh hi. Tua ciangin Jeroboam in Topa zuihna panin Israel hawlkhia-in khialhna lianpi amaute bawlsak hi

Israel mite in Jeroboam' khialhna khempeuh hih uh hi. Kamsangte ahi a nasemte khempeuh tung tawnin a gensa bangin Topa in ama muhna panin Israel a hepkhiat zah dongin tuate panin amaute kihemkhia lo uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amau' gam panin Assiria-ah tuni dongin Israel-te salin a om uh hi.

Tua ciangin Assiria kumpipa in Babylon, Kuthah, Avva, Hamath, leh Sefarvaim panin mite paipih a, Israel mite' tangin Samaria khuapite-ah amaute a koih hi. Amaute in Samaria gam luahin a khuapite-ah teng uh hi
Tua lai-ah a ten' cilun amaute in Topa kihtalo uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin Topa in amaute kimkhat a that humpinelkaite amaute lakah a khah hi

Tua ahih ciangin Assiria kumpipa kiangah, “Nangmah in puakhia-in Samaria khuapite sungah na koih minamte in tua gamte' pasian' thukham theilo uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in amaute lakah humpinelkai khah hi. Amaute in tua gam pasian' thukham theilo uh ahih manin tua humpinelkaite in amaute that uh hi,” ci-in kigen hi
Tua ciangin Assiria kumpipa in thu pia a, “Na puak khiatna uh mun siampite khat tua lai-ah puak un. Amah pai-in tua lai-ah tengin a gamsung pasian' thukhamte amaute hilhsak un,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Samaria panin a puakkhiat uh siampite khat hong pai-in Bethel-ah teng a, amaute in Topa bangci kihtak ding cih thu amaute kiangah a hilh hi
Ahih hangin minam khempeuh in amau' pasian ciat bawl uh a, minam khempeuh in amau' ten'na khuapi sung, Samariate' bawlsa mualtunga biakna munte-ah tuate koih uh hi
Babylon mite in Sukkothbenoth pasian lim, Kuth mite in Nergal pasian lim, Hamath mite in Ashima milim
leh Avva mite in Nibhaz leh Tartak milimte bawl uh hi. Sefarvaim mite in Sefarvaim pasian-te ahi Adrammelek leh Anammelek biakna-in a tate uh mei tawh a hal uh hi
Amaute in Topa zong kihta uh a, mualtunga biakna siampi dingin amau sung panin mi namkim seh uh a, tuate in mualtunga biaknate tungah amau-a' dingin piaksak uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Topa bia uh a, ahih hangin amaute a kipuak khiatna minamte' ngeina bangin amau' pasian-te' na zong semkhawm uh hi

Tuni dongin amaute in a nidanga ngeina bangin gamta uh hi. Amaute in Topa bialo uh hi. Israel min a phuah Jakob' suante' Topa in a thupiak thukhamte ahi a, ngeina kipte ahi a, zuih ding ngeinate ahi a, a thupiakna ahi zongin amaute in zuilo uh hi
Topa in Israel-te tawh thuciamna khat bawlin amaute thu pia a, “Note in pasian dangte kihta loin, amaute mai-ah note kunloin, amau' na zong semloin, amaute tungah biakna zong na pia kei ding uh hi
Egypt gam panin vangliatna leh thahatna tawh a hong paikhiatpih Topa na kihta ding uh hi. Ama mai-ah note na kun ding uh a, ama tungah biakna na pia ding uh hi
Note-a' dingin a gelh thukhamte, ngeina kipte, zuih ding ngeinate, leh thupiaknate zuih ding na kingaihsun tawntung ding uh hi. Note in pasian dangte na kihta kei ding uh a
note tawh ka bawlsa thuciamna na mangngilh kei ding uh hi. Note in pasian dangte na kihta kei ding uh a
ahih hangin Topa na Pasian uh na kihta ding uh hi. Tua ciangin amah in na galte khempeuh uh khutsung panin note hong honkhia ding hi,” a ci hi
Ahi zongin mite in tua thu ngailo uh a, a nidang ngeina bangun gamta veve uh hi

Tua ahih ciangin hih minamte in Topa bia uh a, a kiseek amau' milimte' na zong semkawm uh hi. A tate uh leh a tate uh' tate zong tua bangmahin gamta uh hi. A pu a pate uh gamtat bangin a suan a khakte uh tuni dongin gamta uh hi.
